scenarios.capability: Generate a correct C project Makefile with modern header, automatic dependency tracking, and standard targets
scenarios.reason: Output is a static file that can be evaluated against structural and syntactic rules without execution.

scenarios.capability: Generate a Go project Makefile with version embedding via ldflags and Docker build/push targets
scenarios.reason: Output is a static file; Docker and Go patterns are fully specified in the skill and verifiable by inspection.

scenarios.capability: Generate a Python project Makefile for a package with virtual-env, test, lint, and dist targets
scenarios.reason: Python Makefile patterns are self-contained and the output can be verified against skill rules without running Python.

scenarios.capability: Identify and correct multiple anti-patterns in an existing flawed Makefile
scenarios.reason: The agent produces a corrected Makefile and explanation; correctness is verifiable by inspection.

scenarios.capability: Generate a multi-directory C++ project Makefile using $(MAKE) for recursive sub-makes and order-only prerequisites
scenarios.reason: Structural patterns (order-only prerequisites, $(MAKE) usage) are deterministically verifiable in the output file.
